command:
cd /workspace/ActPlane && /workspace/ActPlane/target/release/actplane --rule 'source COMMAND = exec "**"
rule smoke:
  notify write file "**/.env" if COMMAND
  because "docker write smoke"' --run-as-root run python3 -c 'open(".env", "w").write("x")'; python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
runs=sorted(Path(".actplane/runs").glob("*/feedback.txt"), key=lambda p:p.stat().st_mtime)
p=runs[-1]
text=p.read_text(errors="replace").strip()
print(p, "len", len(text))
print(text[:1200])
PY
